Package org.exist.soap

Interface Summary
Admin This interface defines eXist's SOAP service for write operations on the database.
AdminService  
Query This interface defines eXist's SOAP service for (read-only) queries on the database.
QueryService  
 

Class Summary
AdminServiceLocator  
AdminSoapBindingImpl Provides the actual implementations for the methods defined in Admin.
AdminSoapBindingSkeleton  
AdminSoapBindingStub  
Collection A wrapper around collection information.
QueryResponse  
QueryResponseCollection A wrapper class containing a query summary for all documents for which hits have been found in the collection.
QueryResponseDocument Wrapper class containing a query result summary for a single document.
QueryServiceLocator  
QuerySoapBindingImpl Provides the actual implementations for the methods defined in Query.
QuerySoapBindingSkeleton  
QuerySoapBindingStub  
Session  
Session.QueryResult  
SessionManager
